author: codex-audit

patch.value: Validation evidence: pm validate --check-resolution --check-history-drift --check-files --scan-mode tracked-all returned ok=false with warnings: validate_resolution_missing_fields:18, validate_files_missing_linked_paths:3, validate_history_drift_hash_mismatches:3. These appear historical/pre-existing and were not silently mass-edited because each closed item needs item-specific resolution context.
Project tracker validation hygiene warnings remain
The audit validate sweep found historical tracker hygiene warnings: missing resolution metadata on older closed items, missing linked remote paths, and history hash drift on three items.

Historical closed-item resolution metadata is backfilled with item-specific evidence; missing remote linked paths are corrected or documented; history drift is restored or accepted with explicit audit comments.

value.author: codex-audit
value.text: Duplicate check before create: pm search 'validate resolution missing fields history drift missing linked paths tracker hygiene' found closed related validation work only,not an active item tracking the current warning set. Net-new issue is required under audit feature pm-3fti.

value.author: codex-audit
value.text: Do not generic-backfill closed items without reading each item; preserve historical meaning and use pm mutations only.

value.note: coverage currently passes despite tracker hygiene warnings

message: Create tracker hygiene follow-up from dogfood audit

value.author: codex-release-agent
value.text: Release prep validation rerun on 2026-05-01 confirmed this issue remains the active tracker for historical hygiene warnings: pm validate --check-resolution --check-history-drift reported 18 closed items missing resolution metadata and 3 history hash mismatches; pm normalize --dry-run planned 18 closed_resolution_backfill updates; pm validate --check-files --scan-mode tracked-all reported 3 missing linked paths. No new release-blocking migration/data-loss issue remains after pm-yvwt fix.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: 2026-05-01 dogfood audit: pm validate still reports historical hygiene warnings (closed items missing resolution metadata, 3 history drift items). These are legacy items from early development. Deferring detailed backfill to a dedicated session to preserve historical meaning per item. Current pm health core checks: all pass.
